ELADRIN.NoSeason: No season set. Choose a season to begin.
ELADRIN.NoImagesForSeason: No images saved for {season}. Save a look first in the configuration section.
ELADRIN.DeleteImagesConfirm: Delete saved images for {season}? This will remove the copied files but will not affect the current token or portrait.
ELADRIN.ImagesDeleted: Saved images for {season} have been deleted.
ELADRIN.Settings.UseMidiQolHint: When enabled, season changes rename your existing Fey Step item instead of swapping it, preserving any MIDI QOL automation and effects. Requires: MIDI QOL. Optional: Sequencer + JB2A for teleport animations.
ELADRIN.Settings.ShowEladrinButtonHint: Display the Eladrin Season leaf icon in the token controls sidebar. Disable to hide the button (you can still open the dialog via macro).
ELADRIN.Error.NoActor: Select a token or assign a character first.
ELADRIN.Error.NotEladrin: This character is not an Eladrin.
